title: CandidateFitReport
description: Workspace-private analysis of how a specific candidate's profile and resume match a Job Intelligence Report. Contains skill gap assessment, fit score, and resume rewrite strategy. NOT to be confused with the global Job Intelligence Report — this is candidate-specific.

resume_version_id.description: Optional — only present when report was generated with a resume. Reserved for Sprint 5.

prompt_version.description: FIT_PROMPT_VERSION at generation time. Part of the cache key.

overall_match_score.description: 0–100 fit score. Not a hiring prediction — a signal of alignment between candidate profile and role demands.

match_summary.description: 2–3 sentence narrative summary of fit and gap.

risk_flags.description: Signals that could cause the application to screen out (e.g. title mismatch, missing license, explicit seniority bar).

positioning.description: How to frame the candidate's overall story for this role.

keywords_to_add.description: High-value JD terms missing from the current resume.

evidence_to_surface.description: Experiences or projects the candidate has that should be made more prominent.

interview_talking_points.description: 2-4 concrete angles the candidate should prepare to discuss in interviews for this role.

recommended_next_action.description: Concrete next step: apply now, revise resume first, get more context, skip this role, etc.
